vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-9256
vulnerability.description: Heap buffer overflow in nginx rewrite module when a replacement string with overlapping captures but no variables is used with redirect or query-string arguments

statements.action_statement: Applied upstream nginx mainline commit ca4f92a (Roman Arutyunyan, nginx.com) as build/patches/CVE-2026-9256.patch to the nginx 1.25.5 source tree before compilation. The patch fixes ngx_http_script_regex_start_code() to iterate over each capture group individually when computing escape overhead, preventing the under-allocation that caused the heap overflow.
